prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别为17508→20380→30144→28695→30194名，整体呈显著后移趋势，2021至2023年大幅下降（位次数字大幅增大），2024年略有回升，2025年基本持平于30194名，近5年累计后移约12686名，近3年累计后移约10050名；2021-2025年物理类招生计划分别为51、52、51、59、73人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划99人，较2025年增加26人（+35.6%），大幅扩招，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第58名，近年排名稳定在52-61之间，属于中上水平211院校；2025-2026年声誉评价均为"明显负面"，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第69位，评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等；第五轮学科评估中，教育学A、地理学A、马克思主义理论A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，其中地理科学类在物理类招生，学科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024年评估为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，热度持续偏高，可能推高相关专业竞争热度；能源动力类专业2024年评估为"推荐"，热度偏热。河北省2026年高考总报名人数约60.98万，物理类考生估算约36.5万人，较2025年略有增加；省控线2025年物理类本科批459分，较2024年上升11分，反映整体竞争略有加剧；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，属于长三角发达地区，对河北考生有一定地域吸引力；物理类招生计划从2021年的51人增至2026年的99人，扩招幅度近一倍，显示该校在河北物理类招生力度持续加大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次显著后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+35.6%）、声誉负面舆情可能抑制报考热度、以及计算机/电子等热门专业热度偏高等因素，在，考虑热门专业热度可能部分抵消扩招效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约36846名，区间36346-37346名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 17508 → 20380 → 30144 → 28695 → 30194, showing a significant overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, there was a sharp decline (ranking numbers increased substantially), with a slight rebound in 2024 and essentially flat at 30194 in 2025. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 12686 places, and over the past 3 years, about 10050 places. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 51, 52, 51, 59, and 73 students respectively, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 99 students, an increase of 26 students (+35.6%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, leading to notably eased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 58th, with recent rankings stable between 52 and 61, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. From 2025 to 2026, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, mistakenly displaying the Rising Sun Flag, etc.), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 69th, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has Education A, Geography A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. Among these, Geography Science enrolls in the Physics Category, showing strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were evaluated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in 2024, with sustained high popularity, potentially increasing competition for related majors. The Energy and Power major was evaluated as 'recommended' in 2024, with relatively high popularity. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province Gaokao examinees is approximately 609,800, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 365,000, a slight increase from 2025. The provincial control line for the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 459 points, up 11 points from 2024, reflecting a slight intensification of overall competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to Hebei candidates. The enrollment plan for Physics Category has increased from 51 students in 2021 to 99 students in 2026, nearly doubling, indicating the university's continuously increasing enrollment efforts in Hebei for the Physics Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings, the substantial expansion in 2026 (+35.6%), the negative reputation incidents that may suppress application enthusiasm, and the high popularity of hot majors like Computer and Electronics, and taking into account that the popularity of hot majors may partially offset the expansion effect, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 36846, with a range of 36346 to 37346.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Marine Resources and Environment
- Sociology
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36346-37346, it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Due to the significant expansion of the Physics Category to 99 students in 2026, admission opportunities are notably higher than in previous years. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within 36346) can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. Those with rankings in the middle of the range can prioritize moderate-difficulty majors such as Automation, Geography Science, and Energy and Power. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1914 → 2579 → 3329 → 3483 → 3363, showing an overall backward trend, with a year-by-year decline from 2021 to 2024 (ranking numbers increasing), and a slight recovery to 3363 in 2025. The cumulative backward shift over the past 5 years is approximately 1449 places, and over the past 3 years approximately 34 places, indicating a stabilizing trend. Enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 27, 29, 30, 29, and 25 respectively, with a reduction to 25 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27, an increase of 2 (+8%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with recent rankings stable between 52-61, placing it among mid-to-upper level 211 normal universities. Reputation evaluations for 2025-2026 are both 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs, mistakenly displaying the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may partially suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin heat total ranking is 69th, rated 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education A, Geography A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. The strength in normal and humanities disciplines strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature major was rated 'recommended' in 2024, with relatively high popularity. Law major was rated 'differentiated wait-and-see' in 2024, slightly cooling. Normal/Education majors were rated 'differentiated wait-and-see' in 2024, overall stable. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 477 points, up 28 points from 2024, reflecting an overall intensifying competition trend. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, part of the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal for Hebei candidates. Its enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei is about 25-30 people, a small-scale cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+8%), the negative reputation that may suppress application enthusiasm, and the relatively high popularity of Chinese Language/Literature and other majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3554, with a range of 3054-4054.
